summary: Improves Planban board opening when the right board is ambiguous or the local port is already in use.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: This release helps /pb and /planban open the right Planban surface more consistently. When Planban cannot safely choose one board, it opens the board selector instead of guessing, and local port conflicts now fail with a clearer message.
